emails.subject: Re: I2 NDA
emails.body: I understand that this will be executed in London. Is there a lawyer who will initial the NDA for EnronCredit in connection with our execution? I'm assuming you will have this NDA executed prior to the meeting. Leslie Gillian Johnson@ENRON 11/21/2000 01:32 PM

emails.subject: Re: I2 NDA
emails.body: I understand that this will be executed in London. Is there a lawyer who will initial the NDA for EnronCredit in connection with our execution? I'm assuming you will have this NDA executed prior to the meeting. Leslie Gillian Johnson@ENRON 11/21/2000 01:32 PM

emails.subject: Re: I2 NDA
emails.body: Richard Sage is coordinating the initialing and signing for us which is why I included him on the replies. We will not be meeting with them in person tomorrow, but will be discussing the relationship and the documents that we will be sending. They have changed the appropriate contact person so we will be determining who the new person should be during the call. Thanks. Gillian Leslie Hansen@ECT 11/21/2000 02:29 PM
